name: HRT_RELATION_CONFIG_VL
query: SELECT RC.RELATION_ID, RC.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, RCT.DESCRIPTION, RC.RELATION_CODE, RC.RELATION_TYPE_CODE, RC.RELATION_SEQ_NUMBER, RC.KEY_TABLE_NAME, RC.MODULE_ID, RC.ENABLED_FLAG, RC.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, RC.CREATED_BY, RC.CREATION_DATE, RC.LAST_UPDATED_BY, RC.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, RC.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HRT_RELATION_CONFIG_B RC, HRT_RELATION_CONFIG_TL RCT WHERE RC.RELATION_ID = RCT.RELATION_ID AND RCT.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
